title: York High's parents rewind to the radical 80s
description: ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Last weekend, York High...
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Last weekend, York High turned back the clock for an electrifying 80s-themed Parents Dance.


> On Friday 16 May, the school hall was a nostalgic blast, decked out with Pac-Man cut-outs, a retro TV and Rubik's Cubes galore.


The event was entirely organised and excecuted by the Yorkies who serve on the matric farewell committee.


> The parents hit the dance floor, grooving to iconic 80s beats, reliving their youth with every spin and twirl.


The vibe was pure fun as they battled it out in a lively quiz, answering questions about 80s music and events, guessing TV shows from classic theme songs.

The best-dressed parents and the coolest tables snagged some awesome prizes.

It was a night of laughter and memories that left everyone smiling!

This group of friends had a blast! With them are Wayne McAfee (left), Nathalie and Wayne Harding, Suzi McAfee, Sandra Janse van Vuuren, Chandre Boshoff, Shay MacDonald and Craig and Candyce van der Heever.

Lilly de Bruyn (in pink), a zumba instructor, Veronica Barkhuizen in the middle and Nathalie Harding with all their friends.

Nathalie Harding (blond and leathers, middle) with her zumba friends, taking the party by storm.

Samantha September, Claudia Machelm, Calpurnia Oliphant and Chantal Strauss.

Lizette da Silva and Gaylene Myners.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
